decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly building up a board presence with low-cost creatures and ramp spells to overwhelm the opponent with efficient aggression. By utilizing cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage for quick mana generation, the deck can quickly play out strong creatures like Mossborn Hydra and Sazh's Chocobo. The inclusion of Escape Tunnel and Archdruid's Charm provides additional flexibility and evasion for the creatures. With a solid mix of creature power and support spells, this mono green aggro deck aims to consistently put pressure on the opponent and finish the game quickly.

The deck focuses on fast and aggressive creatures combined with burn spells to quickly take down the opponent's life total. It makes use of efficient creatures like Shocking Sharpshooter and Fanatical Firebrand, along with powerful burn spells like Burst Lightning. The mana base is built around red and white sources, with cards like Sacred Foundry and Inspiring Vantage. The goal is to apply consistent pressure to the opponent and finish them off with a combination of creature damage and direct burn spells.

This Dimir Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature cards with disruptive abilities to control the board and pressure the opponent. By utilizing cards like Superior Spider-Man and Spyglass Siren, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while steadily dealing damage with creatures like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Floodpits Drowner. The inclusion of control spells like Bitter Triumph and Deceit provides additional disruption and removal options to maintain board dominance. With a mix of evasive threats and disruption, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly and efficiently.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quick, aggressive plays to overwhelm the opponent. With a mix of cheap spells like Burst Lightning and Opt, along with creatures like Elusive Otter and Stormchaser's Talent, the goal is to chip away at the opponent's life total while maintaining board presence. The deck also includes cards like Boomerang Basics and Into the Flood Maw to disrupt the opponent's strategy. By utilizing tempo plays and evasion, this deck aims to win the game before the opponent can stabilize.

This Mono Green Aggro deck focuses on utilizing efficient creatures and spells to quickly build a board presence and overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes powerful creatures like Badgermole Cub and Icetill Explorer, along with ramp cards like Llanowar Elves to accelerate mana production. Additionally, cards like Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer provide buffs to the creatures on the battlefield, allowing for quick and effective attacks. With a solid mana base and a mix of creatures and spells, this deck aims to seize control of the game early and maintain pressure on the opponent.

This deck focuses on quickly building up your board with low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves, while controlling the opponent's board with cards like Earthbender Ascension and Mikey & Leo, Chaos & Order. Ba Sing Se provides additional protection for your creatures, while cards like Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage ensure that you have the mana you need. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Mightform Harmonizer and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker, allowing you to overwhelm your opponent with a constant stream of threats.

This deck focuses on using a combination of cards to bring powerful creatures back from the graveyard, allowing for explosive plays and overwhelming your opponent. By utilizing cards like Doomsday Excruciator, Harvester of Misery, and Restless Reef, you can quickly fill your board with threatening creatures. The inclusion of cards like Stock Up and Superior Spider-Man provide added consistency and utility to the deck, while also supporting the reanimation strategy. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with big creatures and powerful combos.

This deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bringing them back onto the battlefield for devastating combos. Cards like Deceit and Winternight Stories help set up the graveyard, while Doomsday Excruciator and Requiting Hex provide strong reanimation targets. Bitter Triumph and Day of Black Sun help control the board while Insatiable Avarice and Superior Spider-Man provide additional value. Stock Up allows for card draw and graveyard manipulation, and Duress helps disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with its graveyard synergy and powerful combo potential.

The main concept of this Grixis Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells. By utilizing creatures like Marauding Mako and Iron-Shield Elf, along with powerful spells like Quantum Riddler and Requiting Hex, the deck aims to quickly reduce the opponent's life total while maintaining control of the board. The inclusion of cards like Cool but Rude and Flamewake Phoenix provides additional value and reach, giving the deck multiple ways to close out the game in a timely manner.

The deck focuses on using a combination of cards to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures and then bring them back onto the battlefield to overwhelm the opponent. It utilizes cards like Duress to disrupt the opponent's strategy, while also including powerful reanimation spells like Doomsday Excruciator and Insatiable Avarice. The deck's win condition relies on creating a large army of reanimated creatures, supported by cards like Bitter Triumph and Requiting Hex to control the board. It also includes cards like Stock Up and Winternight Stories to draw more cards and maintain a steady flow of threats.

The deck focuses on utilizing a combination of control elements and Izzet cards to outmaneuver and overwhelm opponents. By using cards like Stormchaser's Talent, Artist's Talent, Monument to Endurance, and Riverpyre Verge, the player can manipulate the battlefield to their advantage. The deck also includes spells like Accumulate Wisdom, Boomerang Basics, Combustion Technique, and Firebending Lesson to control the flow of the game. Additionally, cards like Gran-Gran, It'll Quench Ya!, and Abandon Attachments provide additional support and removal options. The overall strategy revolves around control tactics and resource management to secure victory.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with low-cost creatures and utilizing burn spells to clear the way for attacks. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creature aggression and direct damage, taking advantage of its efficient creatures and powerful burn spells to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. By combining aggressive creatures like Howlsquad Heavy and Stadium Headliner with burn spells like Burst Lightning and Torch the Tower, the deck can quickly close out games before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with low-cost aggressive White creatures, backed up by cards that provide additional support and disruption. By utilizing cards such as Abandoned Air Temple and Springleaf Drum, the deck aims to mana ramp and maintain board control, while also having access to powerful flying creatures like Sage of the Skies and Momo, Friendly Flier. The inclusion of cards like Soulstone Sanctuary and Figure of Fable further enhances the deck's ability to protect its creatures and disrupt the opponent's strategy.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive Dimir creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The strategy involves playing efficient creatures like Spyglass Siren and Floodpits Drowner while disrupting the opponent with cards like Requiting Hex and Spell Pierce. The deck also includes ways to draw cards with cards like Enduring Curiosity and Tishana's Tidebinder to maintain card advantage. Additionally, the deck includes some removal with cards like Shoot the Sheriff and Bitter Triumph to deal with problematic creatures. The goal is to maintain pressure on the opponent and win through efficient creature combat and disruption.

The deck focuses on using a combination of low-cost creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent and establish board control. With a mix of mana ramp with cards like Llanowar Elves and Gene Pollinator, along with powerful creatures like Craterhoof Behemoth and Ouroboroid, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early on and maintain that pressure throughout the game. With a focus on efficient mana usage and strategic card selection, the deck looks to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent to secure a quick victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing powerful control spells and card draw to outlast opponents while ramping up to play high-cost spells such as Mightform Harmonizer and Fire Magic. It also includes land manipulation cards like Escape Tunnel and Heritage Reclamation to ensure mana consistency. By utilizing a mix of removal spells, counterspells, and ramping abilities, the deck aims to control the game tempo and overwhelm opponents with its powerful late-game threats. Additionally, the inclusion of lands that provide multiple colors ensures the deck has access to a wide range of spells and abilities.
